name: STM32F070 LQFP64
description: Generated from the STM32F070 alternate-function workbook and STM32F070C6 datasheet for STM32F070 LQFP64. This definition models the LQFP64 package with per-signal routing synthesized from Sheet1 package pins and Sheet2 AF0-AF15 matrix data. STM32F070 devices provide larger memory and classic package options while keeping the value-oriented STM32F0 Cortex-M0 core. This package definition exposes 19 peripheral blocks covering 6 timers, 4 serial ports, 2 SPI controllers, 2 I2C controllers, 1 ADC instance, and 1 USB interface.

peripherals.label: ADC1
peripherals.description: Analog-to-digital converter with 16 analog input channels.

peripherals.label: I2C1
peripherals.description: I2C bus controller with SCL, SDA, and SMBA signals.

peripherals.label: I2C2
peripherals.description: I2C bus controller with SCL and SDA signals.

peripherals.label: OSC32
peripherals.description: Low-speed 32.768 kHz oscillator interface with input and output pins.

peripherals.label: RTC
peripherals.description: Real-time clock interface with OUT, TAMP1, and TAMP2 signals.

peripherals.label: SPI1
peripherals.description: SPI controller with NSS, SCK, MISO, and MOSI signals.

peripherals.label: SPI2
peripherals.description: SPI controller with NSS, SCK, MISO, and MOSI signals.

peripherals.label: TIM1
peripherals.description: Advanced-control timer with capture/compare channels CH1, CH2, CH3, and CH4, complementary outputs, a break input, and an external trigger input.

peripherals.label: TIM14
peripherals.description: General-purpose timer with capture/compare channels CH1.

peripherals.label: TIM15
peripherals.description: Advanced-control timer with capture/compare channels CH1 and CH2, complementary outputs, and a break input.

peripherals.label: TIM16
peripherals.description: Advanced-control timer with capture/compare channels CH1, complementary outputs, and a break input.

peripherals.label: TIM17
peripherals.description: Advanced-control timer with capture/compare channels CH1, complementary outputs, and a break input.

peripherals.label: TIM3
peripherals.description: General-purpose timer with capture/compare channels CH1, CH2, CH3, and CH4 and an external trigger input.

peripherals.label: USART1
peripherals.description: USART serial interface with synchronous clock support with TX, RX, CTS, RTS, and CK signals.

peripherals.label: USART2
peripherals.description: USART serial interface with synchronous clock support with TX, RX, CTS, RTS, and CK signals.

peripherals.label: USART3
peripherals.description: USART serial interface with synchronous clock support with TX, RX, CTS, RTS, and CK signals.

peripherals.label: USART4
peripherals.description: USART serial interface with synchronous clock support with TX, RX, CTS, RTS, and CK signals.

peripherals.label: USB
peripherals.description: USB interface with DM and DP signals.
